bodies.notes: decimated to 16 parametric CONTROL sections (from 45 measured stations; support-function interp error <= 0.30; measured cost curve: 28 sections @ IoU 0.9809 / ~14 @ 0.9714 / ~10 @ 0.9615 — 0.30 chosen per the parametric-preferred policy) — semantic form: vectorized zone-named stations (hull-loft kept — the taper is real), cuts/adds grouped into hinge_cuts/tendon_cuts/tendon_details modules; exact values unchanged from plan_v1. Body-level named params unavailable (multi-body plan; emitter restriction). | shell REPLACED by law-solids: control-slice hull INTERSECT 2 fitted ceiling arcs MINUS fitted tip scoop (residuals in params)

shell_loft.doc: outer shell as LAW-SOLIDS: hull of auto-selected vectorized control slices INTERSECT mid-ceiling valley arc INTERSECT dorsal tip-bump arc MINUS fingertip underside scoop — every law fitted with residual cited (template-style decomposition)

children.name: midceil_halfspace
children.source: mid ceiling: tilted half-space whose top face is the fitted line z = midceil_m*y + midceil_b (slope/intercept in params; box rotated about x)

children.name: midceil_pass
children.source: pass-through beyond the mid line's measured window (midceil_y1)

children.name: valleyceil_below
children.source: everything below the valley-arc center

children.name: valleyceil_arc
children.source: valley ceiling: x-axis cylinder, LOWER branch (residual in valley_r param)

children.name: valleyceil_pass_left
children.source: pass-through before the valley window

children.name: valleyceil_pass_right
children.source: pass-through beyond the valley window

children.name: tipceil_arc
children.source: dorsal tip bump: x-axis cylinder, UPPER branch (residual in tipceil_r param)

children.name: tipceil_under
children.source: below the tip-bump arc center (completes the upper-branch clip)

children.name: tipceil_pass
children.source: heel+mid pass-through: the tip clip only applies inside its measured window (from tipceil_y0)

children.name: tip_curl_below
children.source: underside curl cut: x-axis cylinder whose UPPER branch is the measured curl (see curl_* params)

children.name: tip_curl_window
children.source: the curl cut applies only inside its measured window

hinge_cuts.doc: hinge system: clevis gap + knuckle relief + pin bore + snap-pin pockets (all exact B-rep faces; see sources)

children.name: gap
children.source: clevis gap between exact inner-wall planes #79/#8; front wall = exact tilted plane #45

children.name: relief
children.source: knuckle relief: exact cylinder face #80

children.name: pin_bore
children.source: hinge pin bore: exact cylinder faces #41/#43/#46/#47 between the exact annulus planes

children.name: pocketL
children.source: snap-pin pocket: exact full-circle cylinder face #25

children.name: pocketR
children.source: right pocket: same radius as face-measured left pocket; breaks out through the skin (annulus plane at the bore band end)

tendon_cuts.doc: tendon path: bottom slot, top cord scoop and the top channel flat (exact faces / measured laws; see sources)

children.name: slot
children.source: tendon slot: exact wall planes #79/#8, ceiling plane z=4.818769, r2 ceiling coves (faces #81/#89), front wall plane #6; rear overshoots into the gap

children.name: scoop
children.source: top cord scoop: exact cylinder face #60

children.name: channel
children.source: top channel floor: exact tilted plane #70 (n=[0.0, 0.061028, 0.998136], d=9.718026) between the inner walls, from the gap to scoop tangency

tendon_details.doc: material re-added inside the tendon path: post, slot front-corner nooks, cord bar with measured top cut

children.name: post
children.source: tendon post: exact wall planes x=[-26.394306,-23.744305], r1.1 corner cylinders (faces #53/#67/#83/#84)

children.name: nook0
children.source: slot front-corner nook: bounded by wall x=-28.076732, front plane y=2.237571, r2 vertical fillet face #86

children.name: nook0_f
children.source: r2 vertical fillet: exact cylinder face #86

children.name: nook1
children.source: slot front-corner nook: bounded by wall x=-22.076732, front plane y=2.237571, r2 vertical fillet face #7

children.name: nook1_f
children.source: r2 vertical fillet: exact cylinder face #7

children.name: bar0
children.source: cord bar: exact boss cylinder face #57 (r=1.445692 at y=-0.098319, z=13.099509); ends extended to the inner walls (the B-rep blends the bar into the walls via small bspline webs)

children.name: bar1
children.source: cord bar: exact boss cylinder face #56 (r=0.65 at y=-0.731173, z=12.617202); ends extended to the inner walls (the B-rep blends the bar into the walls via small bspline webs)

children.name: bar2
children.source: cord bar: exact boss cylinder face #58 (r=0.65 at y=0.411625, z=12.488705); ends extended to the inner walls (the B-rep blends the bar into the walls via small bspline webs)

children.name: bar_topcut
children.source: bar top web: tangent line through the two rod-top points (-0.731173,13.267202)-(0.411625,13.138705) measured from exact rod faces; everything above is void in the original

params.name: midceil_m
params.source: mid ceiling top slope (line fit over 70 stations y[-15.0,2.5], res 0.073; -3.48 deg)

params.name: midceil_b
params.source: mid ceiling top intercept at y=0 (same fit)

params.name: tipceil_r
params.source: dorsal tip bump arc radius (fit over 70 stations y[6.0,20.0], res 0.184)

params.name: tipceil_cy
params.source: tip bump arc center y (same fit)

params.name: tipceil_cz
params.source: tip bump arc center z — BELOW the curve (upper branch)

params.name: midceil_y1
params.source: ceiling clip boundary: the valley arc law takes over here

params.name: tipceil_y0
params.source: ceiling clip boundary: the tip bump arc takes over here

params.name: valley_r
params.source: mid-to-bump valley arc radius (LOWER branch, center above; fit over y[0.5,6.2], res 0.105)

params.name: valley_cy
params.source: valley arc center y (same fit)

params.name: valley_cz
params.source: valley arc center z — above the part (same fit)

params.name: curl_r
params.source: fingertip underside curl arc radius (UPPER branch, center below; fit over y[8.5,19.8], res 0.045 — a gentle r~75-100 arc, not the r~13 scoop the hand-tuned template assumed)

params.name: curl_cy
params.source: curl arc center y (same fit)

params.name: curl_cz
params.source: curl arc center z — far below (same fit)

params.name: curl_y0
params.source: curl fit-window start (cut applies only inside)

params.name: curl_y1
params.source: curl fit-window end

children.source: right pocket: same radius as face-measured left pocket; breaks out through the skin (annulus plane at the bore band end)

tendon_cuts.doc: tendon path: bottom slot, top cord scoop and the top channel flat (exact faces / measured laws; see sources)

children.name: slot
children.source: tendon slot: exact wall planes #14/#9, ceiling plane z=4.284302, r2 ceiling coves (faces #36/#51), front wall plane #7; rear overshoots into the gap

children.name: channel
children.source: top channel floor: exact tilted plane #64 (n=[0.0, 0.061028, 0.998136], d=9.185094) between the inner walls, from the gap to scoop tangency

tendon_details.doc: material re-added inside the tendon path: post, slot front-corner nooks, cord bar with measured top cut
